contests.title: Two Front Doors – Transition in Progress
contests.description: Following our announcement of two distinct Civitai sites, [Civitai.com](https://civitai.com) is now shifting to the PG/PG-13 experience, with existing content moving to [Civitai.red](https://civitai.red). Some disruption is expected during the transition! We appreciate your patience!

metadata.title: Two Front Doors – Transition in Progress
metadata.content: Following our announcement of two distinct Civitai sites, [Civitai.com](https://civitai.com) is now shifting to the PG/PG-13 experience, with existing content moving to [Civitai.red](https://civitai.red). Some disruption is expected during the transition! We appreciate your patience!
